title: ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Small Pocket Knife Multi Tool - LOGO Black
description:
Stay prepared wherever you go with the ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Pocket Knife Multi Tool. This compact multitool features a knife blade, scissors, nail file, nail cleaner and integrated key ring in a lightweight design that measures just 2.25 inches when closed. Ideal for everyday carry, camping, hiking, fishing, hunting and emergency preparedness kits, this pocket-sized multitool offers practical functionality without taking up valuable space. Each tool locks into position during use, while the built-in key ring makes it easy to attach to keys, backpacks, belt loops and outdoor gear for quick access.

ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Small Pocket Knife Multi Tool - LOGO Black
The ASR Outdoor Mini EDC Pocket Knife Multi Tool packs multiple useful tools into a compact and lightweight design that is easy to carry wherever your adventures take you. Whether you're building an everyday carry setup, stocking an emergency preparedness kit or preparing for a camping trip, this mini multitool provides practical utility in a pocket-sized package.

This versatile multitool features a knife blade, scissors, nail file and nail cleaner, making it useful for a variety of everyday and outdoor tasks. The compact folding design measures approximately 2.25 inches when closed and opens to approximately 5.5 inches, offering functionality while remaining easy to store in a pocket, backpack, tackle box or survival kit.

Each tool locks into place during use for reliable operation, while the integrated key ring allows convenient attachment to keys, backpacks, belt loops, camping gear and other everyday carry accessories. Constructed from durable metal and plastic components, this compact multitool is designed for portability and convenience without adding unnecessary weight.

Ideal for camping, hiking, backpacking, fishing, hunting and emergency preparedness, this mini pocket knife multitool is ready whenever you need it.
Key Features
  • MULTI-TOOL FUNCTIONALITY - Includes a knife blade, scissors, nail file and nail cleaner for a variety of everyday tasks
  • COMPACT EDC DESIGN - Measures approximately 2.25 inches when closed for convenient pocket and gear storage
  • SECURE LOCKING TOOLS - Individual tools lock into position during use for dependable performance
  • INTEGRATED KEY RING - Easily attaches to keys, backpacks, belt loops and outdoor equipment
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - Durable metal and plastic construction provides utility without adding bulk
Specifications
MPN: ASR-Black
UPC: 810131700539
Blade Length: 1.5"
Closed Length: 2.25"
Intended Use: EDC, Camping, Hiking, Fishing, Emergency Prep
Carry essential tools in a compact form with the ASR Outdoor Mini Pocket Knife Multi Tool. Featuring a folding knife blade, scissors, nail file and nail cleaner, this lightweight multitool is designed for everyday utility, outdoor recreation and emergency preparedness.

Measuring approximately 2.25 inches when closed and 5.5 inches when fully opened, the compact design fits easily into pockets, backpacks, gear bags and survival kits. Individual tools lock securely into position during use, while the integrated key ring allows attachment to keys, lanyards, camping gear and other accessories. Durable construction and portable sizing make this multitool a practical addition to any EDC setup.
